mapper.select:
SELECT INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ID , 'T' || EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CREATED_AT) || LPAD(INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ID, 4, '0') AS INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_CODE , TRANSACTION_TYPE , REASON , CREATED_AT , CREATED_BY , CREATED_BY_NAME , STORE_NAME , STORE_ID FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn, temp.* FROM ( SELECT INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ID , T.TRANSACTION_TYPE , T.REASON , T.CREATED_AT , T.CREATED_BY , CASE WHEN U.ROLE = 'OWNER' THEN '점주 ' || U.USER_NAME ELSE U.USER_NAME END AS CREATED_BY_NAME , S.STORE_NAME , STORE_ID FROM INVENTORY_TRANSACTIONS T JOIN USERS U ON ( T.CREATED_BY = U.USER_NO ) JOIN STORES S USING ( STORE_ID )
ORDER BY T.CREATED_AT DESC, T.INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ID ) temp WHERE ROWNUM <= #{paging.endRow} ) WHERE rn >= #{paging.startRow} )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INVENTORY_TRANSACTIONS T JOIN USERS U ON ( T.CREATED_BY = U.USER_NO ) JOIN STORES S USING ( STORE_ID )

SELECT T.INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ID AS INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ID , 'T' || EXTRACT(YEAR FROM T.CREATED_AT) || LPAD(T.INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ID, 4, '0') AS INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_CODE , CASE WHEN T.TRANSACTION_TYPE = 'RECEIPT' THEN '입고' WHEN T.TRANSACTION_TYPE = 'STORE_CLOSING' THEN '마감' WHEN T.TRANSACTION_TYPE = 'ADJUSTMENT' THEN '조정' END AS TRANSACTION_TYPE , T.REASON , T.TRANSACTION_MEMO , T.CREATED_AT AS CREATED_AT , T.CREATED_BY AS CREATED_BY , CASE WHEN U.ROLE = 'OWNER' THEN '점주 ' || U.USER_NAME ELSE U.USER_NAME END AS CREATED_BY_NAME , S.STORE_NAME AS STORE_NAME , STORE_ID AS STORE_ID FROM INVENTORY_TRANSACTIONS T JOIN USERS U ON ( T.CREATED_BY = U.USER_NO ) JOIN STORES S USING ( STORE_ID ) WHERE INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ID = #{inventoryTransactionId}

SELECT INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ITEM_ID , BEFORE_QUANTITY , AFTER_QUANTITY - BEFORE_QUANTITY AS CHANGED_QUANTITY , AFTER_QUANTITY , M.MATERIAL_TYPE || EXTRACT(YEAR FROM M.CREATED_AT) || LPAD(MATERIAL_ID, 4, '0') AS MATERIAL_CODE , M.MATERIAL_TYPE , MATERIAL_NAME , INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ID , STORE_INVENTORY_ID , MATERIAL_ID FROM INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ITEMS JOIN STORE_INVENTORIES USING ( STORE_INVENTORY_ID ) JOIN MATERIALS M USING ( MATERIAL_ID ) WHERE INVENTORY_TRANSACTION_ID = #{inventoryTransactionId} ORDER BY CASE M.MATERIAL_TYPE WHEN 'AF' THEN 1 WHEN 'RF' THEN 2 WHEN 'FF' THEN 3 WHEN 'PK' THEN 4 WHEN 'KW' THEN 5 ELSE 6 END, MATERIAL_CODE
